# IKScannerDeviceViewDisplayMode

**Enumeration**

These constants specify the display mode the scanner view will use. They are used by the [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKScannerDeviceView/mode] property.

## Declaration

```swift
@frozen enum IKScannerDeviceViewDisplayMode
```

## Constants

- **IKScannerDeviceViewDisplayMode.simple**: The view will display in simple mode.
- **IKScannerDeviceViewDisplayMode.advanced**: The view will display in advanced mode.

## Enumeration Cases

- **IKScannerDeviceViewDisplayMode.none**

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Constants

- **IKScannerDeviceViewTransferMode**: These constants determine how the scanner data is returned to the delegate. They are used by the [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKScannerDeviceView/transferMode] property.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
